review_rows.hard_point: the simulator must forbid same-bar execution and keep all tier actions on next-bar open fills only
phase 2 should begin on canonical seed sessions only; do not widen to broader session simulation before seed reproducibility passes
phase 3 replay binding remains blocked; simulator outputs must stay explicitly shadow-only and read-only against the frozen EOD primary

consensus_rows.detail: the simulator specification is sufficiently explicit to begin implementation under the existing shadow-only guardrails
implementation starts on the six canonical seed sessions only; broader all-session simulation remains blocked
trigger at minute-close, fill at next-bar open, with no same-bar trading exceptions
separate intraday replay lane may not open until the simulator exists and passes a deterministic seed audit

interpretation: V1.34B converts the phase-2 simulator spec into an implementation triage result.
The simulator may now be implemented, but only in the narrow seed-session shadow lane and without opening the replay-binding workstream.
